code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test08-DEC-2016Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, suggesting possible renal impairment. Urinalysis reveals significant proteinuria, bilirubin, ketones, and glucosuria, with low specific gravity and abnormal urine color/appearance, further supporting renal dysfunction. HbA1c is low, which may indicate hypoglycemia or a laboratory artifact. Recommend further nephrological evaluation and assessment for underlying metabolic or hepatic disorders.
